summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shiv Bidya Niwas financial services website. Backend APIs fully functional, contact form working with MongoDB integration, WhatsApp button operational. Minor navigation and toast notification issues identified.

integration_issues.issue: Smooth scroll navigation links not found in header - only 1 navigation link detected
Success toast message not clearly visible after form submission, though form reset indicates successful submission
WhatsApp button hover blocked by Emergent badge overlay

passed_tests: Contact form validation (422 for missing fields)
All website sections loading (Hero, Services, Process, About, Testimonials, Contact, Footer)
Contact form fields present and functional
Contact form submission with backend integration
Form validation working (shows error for empty fields)
WhatsApp floating button visible and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor improvements needed: 1) Add proper navigation links with smooth scroll functionality in header, 2) Ensure success toast notifications are more visible after form submission, 3) Fix WhatsApp button hover interaction (overlay issue)
